feature_layout.name: my_active
feature_layout.description: My active mon: hp, knowledge flags, boosts, status, tera/item/ability flags, revealed moves hash, visible species hash.

feature_layout.name: opponent_active
feature_layout.description: Opponent active mon with the same feature template, masked to public information.

feature_layout.name: my_bench
feature_layout.description: Six bench slots: revealed flag, hp/fainted/tera, bench status, visible species hash.

feature_layout.name: opponent_bench
feature_layout.description: Opponent bench slots with the same bench template, masked to public information.

feature_layout.name: field
feature_layout.description: Weather plus global field conditions such as terrain or Trick Room.

feature_layout.name: my_side_conditions
feature_layout.description: My side's public side conditions such as rocks, spikes, screens, veil, and Tailwind.
